rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code homestead exemption amount. The cited rule governs academic accommodations for concussed students. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: Sec. 38.0051. ACADEMIC ACCOMMODATIONS FOR STUDENT WITH CONCUSSION OR OTHER BRAIN INJURY.
_note: No overlap between proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change and Educ. Code §38.0051.
